title: lasianthus strigosus var. chinensis
intro: Lasianthus strigosus var. chinensis is a plant species belonging to the family Theaceae, known for its small white flowers and woody stems, which is a variety of the Lasianthus strigosus plant. Traditionally, the plant is used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Lasianthus strigosus var. chinensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its essential oil is extracted for further use in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
